description: Create an active 'smart' IT provisioning survey in LimeSurvey (admin / Admin123!) titled 'New Hire IT Provisioning 2025'. The survey must contain a 'Role and Software' group with a department selection question (code 'DEPT', text 'Select the department for the new hire:') featuring options 'SALES'/'Sales', 'ENG'/'Engineering', and 'LEGAL'/'Legal'. Include a software license selection question (code 'TOOLS', text 'Select the required software licenses:') with dynamic subquestions: 'SF' (Salesforce CRM) visible only for SALES; 'VS' (Visual Studio) visible only for ENG; 'LN' (LexisNexis) visible only for LEGAL; 'SL' (Slack) visible for SALES or ENG; and 'OFF' (Microsoft Office) always visible.
